about.title: Foundations built through practice.
about.intro: Second-year Computer Science (Cybersecurity) student focused on penetration testing and ethical hacking. I earned my CEH certification before the age of 20 and have continued building hands-on experience through labs, competitions, and practical security work.
points: Hands-on vulnerability assessment using OpenVAS and Nessus in practical lab environments.
System exploitation across Windows and Unix environments, including privilege escalation and lateral movement.
Active Directory attack experience including pass-the-hash, Kerberoasting, and domain privilege escalation.
Ranked in the top 1% globally on TryHackMe and placed in national CTF competitions.
Contributed as both a competitor and challenge creator, building web exploitation scenarios and supporting secure CTF infrastructure.
Currently expanding into blue team domains through SIEM, EDR, and detection engineering to become a more well-rounded security professional.

items.label: TryHackMe Ranking
items.note: Ranked in the top 1% globally on TryHackMe and listed 44th in Malaysia.

items.label: TryHackMe Rooms
items.note: Completed over 350 rooms covering penetration testing, web exploitation, and network exploitation.

items.label: Bingo CTF 2025
items.note: Placed 3rd with a 3-member team across web exploitation, cryptography, and forensics challenges.

items.label: MCMC Finalist
items.note: Finalist in the MCMC Intervarsity Cyber Forensics Challenge 2025 under time-constrained incident analysis.

items.label: Challenges Delivered
items.note: Delivered 9 web challenges and 1 Boot2Root machine across CTF events.

items.label: Technical Talks
items.note: Delivered two web exploitation sessions for DIV:IDE Academy and Hack@10 CTF preparation.

items.label: Certificates Earned
items.note: Including CEHv13, CCNA Intro to Networks, Junior Penetration Tester, and web development training.

items.label: Current GPA
items.note: Bachelor of Computer Science (Cybersecurity) student at Universiti Tenaga Nasional.
